titleStmt.title: SII 15.102: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 102. (B.K. No. 199 of 1928-29.) AṆṆĪGĒRI, NAVALGUND TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the temple of Guḷḷikēri Basavaṇṇa.
This is dated the 6th regnal year of the king, Visha, Pushya-amāvāsyā Wednesday, solar eclipse, corresponding to 1162 A.D., January 17.

It records a gift of land to the goddess Chaṇḍikā of the holy place of Aṇṇigeṟe by Mahāpradhāna Śrīdharayya, the Perggaḍe of Beḷvala-nāḍu, at the request of Paṭṭaṇaverggaḍe Kēśirāja. A portion of the gift land was assigned to the learned Brāhmaṇa who would perform the worship. Kēśirāja whose genealogical account is given, belonged to the Vāji-vamśa. Aṇṇigeṟe is described as the rājadhāni of the Beḷvala country.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© srīma¨rdgī¨rvvāṇakōṭīratāḍitāṁghrisarōruhā . babhāti caṁḍikādēvī daitya sēnā vima¨rddinī .
paranṛpadikpāḷakaraṁ beṁkoṇḍu caṁdrahāsadinādaṁ dhareyoḷpratāpalaṁkēśvara nesedaṁ sainya
bijjanṛpaṁ . © svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ kāḷāṁjarapurava rādhīśvaraṁ suva¨rṇnavṛ
ṣabhadhvajaṁ ḍamarugatū¨ryyani¨rgghōṣaṇaṁ kaḷacuriya kuḷakamaḷamā¨rttaṇḍaṁ kadana pracaṁḍaṁ mānakana
kācaḷaṁ subhaṭarādityaṁ kaligaḷaṁkuśaṁ gajasāmanta śaraṇāgatevajrapaṁjaraṁ pratāpalaṁ kēśvaraṁ vairībha kaṇṭhī
radaṁ paranārīsahōdaraṁ śanivārasiddhi giridu¨rggamallaṁ caladaṁkarāmaṁ niśśaṁkamallaṁ nāmādisamastapra
śasti sahitaṁ śrīmadbhujabaḷacakrava¨rtti tribhuvanamalla bijjaṇadēvavijayarājyamuttarōtta rābhi
v®ddhiprava¨rddhamānamācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi . v® . [Aṁtu] vidvajjanavakrapaṁkē
ruhaṣaṇḍa lakṣmī samāna vadanaṁ paṁ camaṁ satataṁ māḍiya
kṣitiyoḷsiddhugi daṁḍanāthanesedaṁ śāṁḍilyagōtrō dbe
vaṁ . hara prakāśadoḷu rēṁdrekuṁjaraṁgu¨rbbiyoḷe tanugiri
yoḷdoreyeṁbi virājisuti¨rppudadrijāvarahaṁsa nōjvaḷō¨rjjita
yaśōlate siddhugidaṁḍanāthanaṁ . va . Ā daṁḍanāthanaṁkakāra lakṣmīvadhugaḷaṁkaraṇamenisi . kaṁ . kṛtapu
ṇyaṁ boppadēva rājanuṁ vibudha jana stutamāya dēvasēnāpatiyuṁ vibhu
ba¨rmmaṇayyanuṁ karaṇaṁgaḷu . va . Antu tadīyabāṁdhavaṁ . kaṁ . guṇanidhi samasta vibudha praṇayaṁ caturaṁ
burāśisaṁv®tadhātrīpraṇutaṁ dayāparaṁ paṭṭaṇave¨rggaḍe kēsirājanudghatējaṁ . va . Antu mattaṁ . v® . manu
mā¨rggaṁ sōmanāthaṁ janakananupamākāṁta mādēviyar janani prōdyadguṇāḷaṁkṛta nijasati sāvitri
śuṁbhaccaritra[¨rmmanō]jāta nāgaṇanuṁ nelasasadvājivaṁśōdbhanaṁ neṭṭanebhāradvājagō trōnnatane�
daniḷālōkadoḷkēsirājaṁ . va . Antadalladeyuṁ . vananidhivēṣṭitākhiḷadharāvadhugoppuva nūtnara
tnamaṁḍanatarameṁbinaṁ sogayikuṁ gaḍa beḷvalamalli tāne sajjanavanaramyamapratima saṁpadamaggaḷa
rājadhāni naṭṭane ramaṇīyamaṇnigeṟe sa¨rvvajanōdgha sukhapradāyakaṁ . va . Antu mattaṁ .
v® . gāvuṁḍava¨rggaṁ kṣitidēvava¨rggaṁ dēvabrajōdyatpurava¨rggameṁdiṁtāviḥk®taśrī viḷasatriva¨rggaṁ bhū
vaṁdyamintanyataṭākamēkaṁ . pusiyadudāravṛtti poṇa¨rdaṁjada sāhasavṛtti pāpadatta sagada śauca
vṛtti calamallada susthiravṛtti naijadiṁdeseye guṇāḍhyava¨rgga maniḷātaḷadoḷdiṭadinde kū¨rttu kī¨rttisada
nāvanaṇnigeṟeya prathitaprabaḷatriva¨rggamaṁ . va . Antadalladeyuṁ . © svastiśrīmatkaḷacu
riya kuḷakamaḷa tribhuvanaika vīrabijjaṇadēva va¨rṣada 6 neya viṣa saṁvatsarada puṣya damavāsye
budhavāra vyatipāta sū¨ryyagrahaṇadandu śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ sēnāpati beḷvala nāḍape
¨rggaḍe daṇḍanāyakaṁ śrīdharayyaṁgaḷu samastakaraṇaṁgaḷu dha¨rmmakā¨ryyakkanukūḷarāge paṭṭaṇa
ve¨rggaḍe kēsirājana binnapadiṁ dha¨rmmatatpararāgi śrīmadrājadhānipaṭṭaṇamaṇnigeṟeya śrīpuṇya
kṣētrada caṁḍikādēviya raṁgabhōganivēdyake Alliya purada teṁkaṇa sthaḷadoḷage śrimauḷēśvara
da poladindaṁ teṁka kaḷakaḷēsvarada poladinda muḷuguṁdada he¨rvvaṭṭeyiṁ paḍuva balliya purade stha
ḷadiṁdaṁ baḍaga mattaṁ balliyapuradasthaḷadiṁdaṁ mūḍalu mūvattumūṟu gēṇa gaḷeyoḷaḷe
du sa¨rvvanamasyamāgi biṭṭa mattarāṟaṟoḷage balliyapurada nāgarāsipaṁḍita¨rgge paṁcōttarade
mattavondanuḷiye mattaraydaṟoḷege triva¨rggaṁgaḷu vidvāṁse bāhmaṇanāgi tāṁgida pūjārige ma
ttaroṁdu kammaṁ nālnūrayvattu Intī dha¨rmmamaṁ nāḍadhikārigaḷuṁ karaṇaṁgaḷuṁ triva¨rggaṁgaḷuṁ sa¨rvvabā
dhāparihāramāgi pratipāḷisuvaru . Intidha¨rmmamanāro¨rvva¨rppatipāḷisida(pratipāḷisidava)
¨rgge vāraṇāsi kurukṣētra prayogeyeṁba puṇyatī¨rtthaṁgaḷalli catu¨rvvēda pāragarappa sahasrabrā
hmaṇa¨rgge sāsira kavileyaṁ kōḍuṁ koḷaguma ponnoḷkaṭṭisiyamāvāsyayodivāra sū¨ryyagra
haṇa byatīpāta saṁkramaṇameṁba mahātithigaḷoḷdānaṁ geyda viśiṣṭa puṇyaphaḷamakkumida nāvanō
¨rvvanaḷidātaṁ vāraṇāsi kurukṣētrādi tī¨rthaṁgaḷoḷcatu¨rvvēdapāragarappa sahasra brāhma ṇarumaṁ
sahasra kavileyumaṁ puṇyatithigaḷoḷkhaḍgapāṇiyogi svehastediṁ hatiyisida mahā pātakana
kku . ślōka . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭi¨rvva¨rṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē
krimiḥ . bahubhi¨rvvasudhā dattā rājabhissagarādibhiḥ . yasya yasya yadā bhūmistasya tasyaca tatphaḷaṁ .
caṁḍikādēviya kammanālnūrayvattu .
Digital edition of SII 15.102 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
